meanings.definition: move something or somebody to a lower position
examples: take down the vase from the shelf

meanings.definition: cause the downfall of; of rulers

examples: The principal visited his rage on the students

meanings.definition: cause to come to the ground
examples: the pilot managed to land the airplane safely
Her playing brought down the house

meanings.definition: cut down on; make a reduction in
examples: The employer wants to cut back health benefits
